title: Clean work area during operations
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Clean work area during operations demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for cleaning work

pcs.text: Receive instructions from supervisor and clarify where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Receive instructions from supervisor and clarify where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Receive instructions from supervisor and clarify where required.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards and food safety hazards and inform supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards and food safety hazards and inform supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards and food safety hazards and inform supervisor.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and follow Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for cleaning work.

pcs.text: Wear appropriate personal protective equipment and ensure correct fit
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Wear appropriate personal protective equipment and ensure correct fit?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Wear appropriate personal protective equipment and ensure correct fit.

pcs.text: Confirm that cleaning and sanitising agents and services are available and ready for use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm that cleaning and sanitising agents and services are available and ready for use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm that cleaning and sanitising agents and services are available and ready for use.

pcs.text: Prepare chemicals and products in line with workplace and safety guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare chemicals and products in line with workplace and safety guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare chemicals and products in line with workplace and safety guidelines.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Keep work area free from waste or discarded trimmings to ensure a safe working environment for fellow workers.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain segregation of edible and inedible product at all times.
